name: food-delivery-microservices
description: MVP microservices backend for a real-time food delivery platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix services/auth-service install && npm --prefix services/restaurant-service install && npm --prefix services/order-service install && npm --prefix services/delivery-service install && npm --prefix services/tracking-service install && npm --prefix services/notification-service install && npm --prefix services/integration-service install && npm --prefix services/api-gateway install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix services/auth-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/restaurant-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/order-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/delivery-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/tracking-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/notification-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/integration-service run dev" "npm --prefix services/api-gateway run dev"
